desc: Offline follow-up to ticket 071: locate the current 7.1.3 DockChannel HID stop with bounded observation-only instrumentation. Log/counter existing mailbox hard-IRQ pending/mask state, RX drain batches/bytes and post-drain FIFO count, plus DCHID report/event types, STM-ready/id_ready transition, identity replies and interface creation. Do not change control flow, add polling/kicks/retries, touch new MMIO, or enable USB/storage/SPMI/PMU. Retain ticket-067 embedded config, storage-disabled DT, Alpine RAM-root and ttydc0; build/hash/static-preflight the trace image, then stop before a reviewed rig proposal. Evidence: done/2026-07-23-t6040-alpine-hid-rx-rearm-result.md.
author: codex
